overall.description: Nighttime driving sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling along a coastal highway through semi-urban areas transitioning to open badlands with the Night City skyline visible in the distance. The footage features realistic game engine graphics with atmospheric lighting and weather effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane coastal highway with urban buildings on left

events.description: vehicle passes by on the left in the opposite lane
game notification UI appears indicating mission update

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the multi-lane highway, maintaining speed while navigating light traffic

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights on approaching in the opposite lane

entered.detail: white concrete divider separating the highway from the coastal drop-off on the right
multi-story residential buildings with illuminated windows lining the left side of the highway
tall street lamp casting yellow-orange light onto the road surface
utility cables stretching across the highway against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: Driving along a multi-lane coastal highway at night, with urban apartment buildings illuminated on the left and a concrete guardrail on the right. Street lights line the left side of the road, casting pools of light on the asphalt as vehicles pass by in the opposite lane. The sky is overcast with dark clouds, and the overall atmosphere is moody and atmospheric.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding coastal highway with distant city skyline view

events.description: exiting the built-up urban area, the road curves right revealing the open badlands and distant city skyline
vehicle navigates a sustained right-hand curve along the coastal road

agents.ego_description: navigating a right-hand curve on the coastal highway, with the Night City skyline emerging into view ahead

notable_agents.action: car ahead with taillights visible, driving in the same direction along the curve

entered.detail: distant futuristic cityscape with illuminated skyscrapers and neon lights visible through the haze
sparse desert bushes and small Joshua trees dotting the roadside terrain
wooden utility poles with transformers and cables running alongside the road

segments.scene_description: The highway transitions to a winding two-lane coastal road as the vehicle curves right, leaving the urban buildings behind. The Night City skyline emerges in the distance, a glowing metropolis of skyscrapers against the dark overcast sky. Desert vegetation and utility poles line the roadside, and the road surface shows yellow dividing lines as it curves through the open badlands terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a coastal highway that transitions from a moody urban corridor into the open expanse of the badlands. It begins on a multi-lane road flanked by illuminated apartment buildings and street lights that cast rhythmic pools of light across the dark asphalt. As the vehicle curves right, the urban architecture recedes and the highway narrows into a winding two-lane road marked by yellow dividing lines. The scene then opens up to reveal desert vegetation and utility poles lining the roadside, while the glowing skyscrapers of the Night City skyline emerge against the overcast night sky. Finally, the camera glides further into the desolate terrain, leaving the city lights behind as it navigates the curves of the open landscape.
